name: clawdhub
tagline: ClawHub (249★): Use the ClawdHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawdhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new
verdict: The install-login-publish chain has no fallback: if npm install fails, login fails, or a registry call times out, nothing tells you what to do next. It also never says what it's NOT for despite covering search, install, update, and publish at once. Security is otherwise clean.

highlights.summary: Multi-step flow depends on npm install, an auth step (login), and repeated network calls to a registry, but nothing anywhere states what to do if install fails, login fails, or a n
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / pointer-to-alternative language anywhere in description or body, despite the skill covering multiple overlapping actions (search/install/update/publish)
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog/dated-revision section anywhere in the body; the --changelog flag shown is an argument for skills being published TO clawdhub, not
